user.title: Aurora Whisper
user.description: Connect to an OpenAI-compatible Whisper transcription endpoint.

data_description.base_url: Root URL of the OpenAI-compatible API; it must end with /v1.
data_description.api_key: Bearer token sent in the Authorization header. Leave empty for servers without authentication.
data_description.model: Model name, e.g. kb-whisper-large or whisper-1.
data_description.language: ISO-639-1 code used when the pipeline does not request a specific language, e.g. sv.
data_description.timeout: How long to wait for a transcription before giving up.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the API. Check the base URL and your network.
error.invalid_auth: The API rejected the credentials. Check the API key.

data_description.model: Model name, e.g. kb-whisper-large or whisper-1.
data_description.language: ISO-639-1 code used when the pipeline does not request a specific language.
data_description.prompt: Optional context hint passed to the model to improve accuracy.
